title: Mesosphaerum obtectum
taxonomy: Mesosphaerum obtectum is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to South America and belongs to the genus Mesosphaerum. Mesosphaerum obtectum is further classified as a member of the order Lamiales. Mesosphaerum obtectum's classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in this family.
